disclaimer: Quality-review evidence only; not a determination of misconduct, a regulatory breach, or a disciplinary decision. No action has been taken.
narrative: Quality review of interaction INT-55231 (collections voice call, window ending 2026-07-15) fired 4 compliance-critical findings and 2 coaching findings. The agent disclosed the outstanding balance before completing identity verification, no call recording or monitoring notice was detected in the opening turns, the collections mini-Miranda disclosure was not detected, and a prohibited improper-threat phrase ('have you arrested') appears at turn t6. Two coaching items: a customer complaint at t5 was not acknowledged, and an agent call-back commitment at t8 should be captured as follow-up. Suggested QA disposition: Compliance review required. A human QA lead or compliance reviewer should weigh the considerations (for example, disclosures delivered in an IVR segment or in writing, or possible transcription errors) before dispositioning and before any coaching or routing. Quality-review evidence only; not a determination of misconduct, a regulatory breach, or a disciplinary decision. No action has been taken.
